supabase_project_ref.description: The project reference ID from your Supabase URL. For https://xyz.supabase.co, enter: xyz (lowercase letters and numbers only, no URL or slashes)

supabase_key.description: Your anon or service_role key. Found in Supabase Dashboard → Project Settings → API.

table_name.description: The Supabase table that will store ticket snapshots. Use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores (e.g. ticket_snapshots). Must exist before app installation.
